diagram_title: Codex Rotation Hotfix — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: opencode Daemon
systems.description: Backend process hosting rotation + session stream logic

systems.name: ChatGPT Subscription Edge
systems.description: Upstream chatgpt.com backend hosting codex/responses + wham/usage

containers.name: Account Subsystem
containers.description: Account storage, quota polling, rotation tracking

containers.name: Rotation Engine
containers.description: Rate-limit judgement + 3D candidate scoring + fallback selection

containers.name: Session Stream
containers.description: LLM stream pipeline invoking rotation on rate-limit and dispatch errors

components.name: OpenAIQuotaFetcher
components.description: Fetches wham/usage and parses hourly + weekly remaining

components.name: CockpitStrategyGate
components.description: Decides whether a provider family uses proactive cockpit detection; extended to include codex

components.name: FallbackCandidateBuilder
components.description: Builds the candidate pool with per-family quota filtering and the codex-family-only gate

components.name: CodexFamilyOnlyGate
components.description: Hard-coded check inside buildFallbackCandidates that drops non-codex candidates when currentVector is codex

components.name: CodexFamilyExhaustedError
components.description: NamedError raised when codex-family-only gate yields empty candidate pool

components.name: BackoffReasonParser
components.description: Message-based classifier; extended with codex 5H patterns

components.name: HandleRateLimitFallback
components.description: Session-side rotation entry point; surfaces CodexFamilyExhausted when pool empty

components.name: ProcessorPreflightSurface
components.description: Preflight rotation caller; displays CodexFamilyExhausted message to operator

components.name: DaemonLogger
components.description: log.info log.warn surface per AGENTS.md rule 1

relationships.description: Cockpit gate invokes quota fetcher for openai or codex family
HTTPS GET wham/usage with codex OAuth bearer
Candidate builder reads quota snapshot per candidate
Builder applies codex-only gate after quota filtering
handleRateLimitFallback calls findFallback which delegates to buildFallbackCandidates
Null findFallback plus codex vector surfaces the error to session
Processor preflight catches and renders CodexFamilyExhausted for TUI / webapp
Classifier reads upstream error body to detect 5H patterns
